hinweis: Curated post-mortems of the mentions live runs: every incident with its impact and the verified fix. Sources: bot_events/decisions logs of the runs, commits and pull requests of this repo. Honesty principle: false triggers and outages are reported, not explained away.

eintraege.titel: False trigger on a special episode (Cerebras/BFL)
eintraege.was_passierte: A non-main-episode upload was accepted as an episode drop and triggered buys, although the market rule only counts playlist episodes.
eintraege.auswirkung: Mistaken buys on a non-qualifying drop; loss bounded by the clip limits.
eintraege.fix: Positive identification instead of a blocklist: a YouTube drop only counts when NEWLY added to the official playlist (baseline diff); RSS only accepts the main-episode file pattern ALLIN-E<n>.

eintraege.titel: Budget estimate blocked five legitimate follow-up trades
eintraege.was_passierte: The cap-price estimate overstated spent budget; the server additionally rejected orders whose amount plus fees exceeded the balance (clip 15.00 on a 15.01 balance).
eintraege.auswirkung: Five rule-conforming NO opportunities went unused.
eintraege.fix: Budget sync against the real wallet balance after every fill plus a 3% fee buffer per clip.

eintraege.titel: Market makers pull their quotes at the drop
eintraege.was_passierte: At the JRE #2523 drop every ask was pulled; the NO round found no offers (0 trades), quotes only returned minutes later.
eintraege.auswirkung: Rule-conforming candidates without a fill; at E280, NOs still traded at 0.50-0.70 after our round.
eintraege.fix: 45-minute follow-up window: open YES/NO candidates are re-checked every 90 s and bought as soon as liquidity returns below the cap.

eintraege.titel: Silent bot deaths on sleep/session teardown
eintraege.was_passierte: Detached bot processes died without a crash log on system sleep or session end (hours of silent outage on 12, 13 and 16 July).
eintraege.auswirkung: Observation and trading gaps during active market windows.
eintraege.fix: Watchdog as a scheduled task (5-minute cadence): heartbeat check via bot_events.jsonl, PID-based killing of hung instances, restarts only inside the configured time window.

eintraege.titel: Watchdog false-kill during the quiet follow-up window
eintraege.was_passierte: The follow-up window wrote no events; after 13 minutes of silence the watchdog killed the running process and restarted it, and the restart set a fresh baseline.
eintraege.auswirkung: The follow-up ran 13 instead of 45 minutes; potential follow-up buys were lost. No double trades (restart protection).
eintraege.fix: Heartbeat events during the follow-up window so the watchdog no longer classifies running follow-ups as dead.

eintraege.titel: Fortran runtime abort on watchdog start
eintraege.was_passierte: The only bot with speaker verification died after start with 'forrtl error (200) ... window-CLOSE event': the Intel Fortran runtime (via speechbrain) reacted to the closing of the scheduler task's short-lived console window.
eintraege.auswirkung: Bot start failed reproducibly whenever launched by the scheduler instead of interactively.
eintraege.fix: FOR_DISABLE_CONSOLE_CTRL_HANDLER=1 in the environment of all watchdog-started bots; verified through whisper_bereit (cuda/float16, speaker verification active).

eintraege.titel: Log reconstruction diverged from the wallet statement
eintraege.was_passierte: The FAK order status returned no fill price for several clips; the log reconstruction assumed the 0.90 cap price, overstating stakes (E281: 360 instead of the real 288 USD) and understating shares (Blue: 147 instead of 179.8).
eintraege.auswirkung: runs.json reported +15 USD for E281 while the wallet statement showed +119.84 USD; a manual reconciliation surfaced the gap.
eintraege.fix: Curated wallet reconciliation as an overlay (wallet_netto_usd per run and total) plus a documented estimate note in the runs.json header; cash figures are reported wallet-reconciled from now on. Follow-up: fills are now taken from the FAK post response (exact amounts).

eintraege.titel: Book log outage caused by a 404 of a resolved market
eintraege.was_passierte: An early-resolved market returned 404 on its order book; the snapshot pass aborted entirely, roughly 30 hours without book data.
eintraege.auswirkung: Gap in the order-book history for post-run analysis; the buying path was unaffected.
eintraege.fix: Book-log resilience (errors isolated per token) plus a process restart so running instances load the merged fix.

eintraege.was_passierte: The first watcher run only saw 100 markets because the Gamma API silently caps the limit parameter and sorted stale markets to the front.
eintraege.auswirkung: Scan universe roughly 15x too small; signals incomplete.
eintraege.fix: Two-window fetch (recently expired + upcoming) with pagination; the second run scanned 1468 markets.
